text:
Created attachment 246115
config.log

# portupgrade -v print/libspectre
[...]
checking for libgs >= 9.53.0... no
configure: error: You need libgs >= 9.53.0 in order to compile libspectre
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.
However :
# find /usr/local/lib -name libgs.so*

/usr/local/lib/compat/pkg/libgs.so.9.24
/usr/local/lib/compat/pkg/libgs.so.9
/usr/local/lib/compat/pkg/libgs.so.9.16
/usr/local/lib/compat/pkg/libgs.so.9.56
/usr/local/lib/libgs.so.10.02
/usr/local/lib/libgs.so.10
/usr/local/lib/libgs.so

Regards,
Xavier
